creator: steinhelten@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 252767
top CPU consumers in htop with character graphic by CPU

Despite showing the correct CPU usage in digits, the character-based graphic for htop does not show the correct CPU usage

Can be reproduced by

$ stress -c 4 &
$ htop
$ uname -a
FreeBSD generic 14.1-RELEASE-p3 FreeBSD 14.1-RELEASE-p3 GENERIC arm64

(don't forget to kill stress() when you're done)
